description: Random image prompts used when user asks to generate an image without specifying what. Add your own!
prompts: a cyberpunk cityscape at sunset with neon reflections on wet streets
a serene mountain lake surrounded by autumn trees and morning fog
a steampunk robot reading a book in a cozy library
an underwater temple with glowing coral and tropical fish
a wolf howling at a massive aurora borealis in the arctic
a floating island with waterfalls and ancient ruins at golden hour
a cozy cabin in a snowy forest with warm light glowing from the windows
a dragon perched on a crystal mountain at dawn
a futuristic space station orbiting a ringed planet
a samurai standing in a field of cherry blossoms in the rain
a magical library with books flying off the shelves
an old lighthouse on a cliff during a dramatic thunderstorm
a fox walking through an enchanted forest with glowing mushrooms
a vintage train crossing a massive stone bridge over a misty valley
a robot tending a garden of bioluminescent flowers on Mars
